discovered_constraints: GitLab-first push policy: push to gitlab remote (192.168.1.180), NOT directly to GitHub
Agent module re-export pattern: add to lib.rs with OS-RESEARCH comment, then re-export section
DateTime<Utc> Display uses space-separated format, not ISO 8601
Container/K8s crates need Podman (not Docker) as default engine
All 6 S23-S28 crates use workspace deps (no external deps needed)
Installer follows distro conventions: ANSI colour helpers (msg/warn/err/info), ── section separators, set -euo pipefail
Interactive installer needs TTY for disk confirmation and recovery key acknowledgment
Quick installer uses env vars only — no TTY required for CI
